hero.subTitle: I build scalable software systems and real-world machines.

intro.title: Who am I?
intro.subTitle: I'm Laszlo Toth, a dedicated Software Engineer
intro.paragraph: Passionate Software Engineer with a decade of experience in various programming languages and technologies. I have deep expertise in PHP, especially Laravel, along with broad experience across multiple platforms. I focus on building efficient systems, improving processes, and delivering real-world solutions.

workExperience.title: My work experience
workExperience.subTitle: What I’ve built, improved, and explored over the years

jobs.description: Explored archaeological fieldwork and documentation both on-site and in-office, contributing to excavation processes and data handling. Gained hands-on experience outside software, while observing how heavy bureaucracy can slow down innovation and digital adoption.

Delivered custom solutions for multiple clients, working across Laravel, React, and Neos CMS. Contributed to building scalable systems from concept to production, translating complex business ideas into working software.
Integrated multiple third-party systems into the core platform using Symfony, TypeScript, and React, improving interoperability and streamlining operational workflows.
Built and maintained governance and board management systems used in enterprise environments, working with Laravel, React, TypeScript, and AWS to ensure reliability, scalability, and compliance.
Led development of a full-scale e-commerce platform and internal back-office tools, designing architecture and delivering features using Laravel, Vue.js, and AWS.
Developed and maintained multiple systems including booking, partner management, and public APIs, contributing to a complex ecosystem built with Laravel, Vue.js, GraphQL, and Azure.
Developed CRM and financial systems using a microservices approach, focusing on reporting, data integrity, and scalable backend architecture.
Enhanced warehouse management systems and built integrations with major e-commerce platforms, improving logistics automation and system connectivity.
Worked on a wide range of systems including CRM, order management, and marketing tools, while supporting internal operations through service desk responsibilities.
Developed webshops, CMS, CRM and factory management systems, as well as internal tools and Android applications, gaining broad experience across full-stack development and system administration.

services.title: Building systems across software and the real world
services.subTitle: I work across backend, frontend, infrastructure, and hardware - connecting ideas, systems, and teams into working solutions.

services.title: System Architecture
services.subTitle: Designing scalable systems from idea to production - balancing business needs, technical constraints, and long-term maintainability.

services.title: Full-stack Development
services.subTitle: Building reliable applications across backend and frontend using modern frameworks, with a strong focus on performance and clarity.

services.title: Integration & Automation
services.subTitle: Connecting services, APIs, and external systems into cohesive workflows that reduce manual work and improve efficiency.

services.title: IoT & Hardware Systems
services.subTitle: Bridging software with the physical world - working with embedded systems, sensors, and real-world constraints.

services.title: System Improvement
services.subTitle: Refactoring, optimizing, and stabilizing existing systems - making them faster, cleaner, and easier to work with.

services.title: Collaboration & Delivery
services.subTitle: Working closely with teams, stakeholders, and clients to turn ideas into delivered, working solutions.
